body-size-height.name: Height override
body-size-height.desc: Body size height override (not for auto shape)

body-size-width.name: Width override
body-size-width.desc: Body size width override (not for auto shape)

body-size-depth.name: Depth override
body-size-depth.desc: Body size depth override (not for auto shape)

lightOccluder.name: Light Occluder
lightOccluder.desc: Mark as a light occluder (collision group bit 15, 0x8000). Raycast with filterGroups 0x8000 to test only against occluders.

SetWorldGravity.description: Set world gravity in x,y,z axis.

SetSolverIterations.description: Set the number of solver iterations for the physics world.

iterations.name: Iterations
iterations.desc: Number of solver iterations (higher = more accurate but slower).

Raycast.description: Cast ray from x0,y0,z0 to x1,y1,z1.

solid.name: Solid
solid.desc: If true, a ray starting inside a collider immediately hits it (TOI=0). If false, the shape is treated as hollow and the ray exits through the far side.

CastShape.display-text: {my}: Cast shape, tag {0}, shape {1} (H:{2}, W:{3}, D:{4}) from [i]{5},{6},{7}[/i] to [i]{8},{9},{10}[/i], rotation [i]{11}°X, {12}°Y, {13}°Z[/i], max ToI {14}, hit margin {15}, filter groups {16}, exclude UID {17}, skip backfaces {18}
CastShape.description: Cast a shape from a point in a given direction.

maxToI.name: Cast distance multiplier
maxToI.desc: Modify the distance cast from the origin by multiplying it by this value.

excludeUID.name: Exclude Body UID
excludeUID.desc: Exclude body UID such as the source.

solid.name: Solid
solid.desc: If true, a shape cast starting inside a collider stops immediately (TOI=0). If false, the shape is treated as hollow.

items.adaptive: Adaptive per C3 tick using C3 dt

defaultLinearDamping.name: Default linear damping
defaultLinearDamping.desc: Default linear damping for new bodies.

SetRestitution.description: Set the restitution (bounciness) of a body.

SetRestitutionCombineRule.description: Set how restitution is combined between two colliding bodies.

rule.name: Combine rule
rule.desc: How restitution values are combined between two colliders.

SetSleepThreshold.description: Set the linear velocity threshold below which a body can fall asleep.

SetFriction.description: Set the friction of a body.

SetPositionOffset.description: Set position offset of object from body

SetBodyType.description: Switch body type at runtime (Dynamic, Fixed, Kinematic).

SetNextKinematicTranslation.description: Move a kinematic body to a position. Unlike Translate, this lets Rapier compute velocity for correct collision response with dynamic bodies.

SetNextKinematicRotation.description: Rotate a kinematic body. Unlike Rotate, this lets Rapier compute angular velocity for correct collision response with dynamic bodies.

ApplyImpulse.description: Apply impulse to body at relative point.

SetCCD.description: Set Continuous Collision Detection (CCD) for body.

enable.name: Enable CCD
enable.desc: Enable or disable continuous collision detection.

SetEnabledRotations.display-text: Set {my} enabled rotations X:{0} Y:{1} Z:{2}
SetEnabledRotations.description: Lock or unlock rotation axes. Set false to prevent rotation on that axis.

SetEnabledTranslations.display-text: Set {my} enabled translations X:{0} Y:{1} Z:{2}
SetEnabledTranslations.description: Lock or unlock translation axes. Set false to pin the body on that axis.

SetGravityScale.description: Set per-body gravity scale. 1.0 = normal, 0.0 = weightless, 2.0 = double gravity.

ApplyAngularImpulse.description: Apply an instantaneous rotational impulse to a body (one-shot, unlike ApplyTorque which is per-step).

WakeUp.description: Force a sleeping body to wake up and resume physics simulation.

Sleep.description: Force a body to sleep, pausing its physics simulation until woken.

SetCollisionFilterGroup.description: Set collision groups of body, power of 2, each bit is a group.

SetCollisionGroups.list-name: Set collision group membership and filter
SetCollisionGroups.description: Set collision groups membership and filter with hex strings.

membership.name: Membership
membership.desc: Indicates what groups the collider is part of (one bit per group, hex string)

filter.name: Filter
filter.desc: Indicates what groups the collider can interact with (one bit per group, hex string).

SetLightOccluder.description: Mark this body as a light occluder (collision group bit 15). Use filterGroups 0x8000 in raycasts to test only against occluders.

enable.name: Enable
enable.desc: Enable or disable light occlusion for this body. Light-occluding bodies are in collision group bit 15 (0x8000). Raycast with filterGroups 0x8000 to test only against occluders.

SetCollisionFilterMask.description: Set collision filter mask of body.

ApplyForce.description: Apply force to body at relative point.

AttachSpring.display-text: {my} Attach spring {0} to uid {1}, length {2}, stiffness {3}, damping {4}, {5}, {6}, {7}, {8}, {9}, {10}
AttachSpring.description: Attach spring from this body to another body.

CreateCharacterController.display-text: {my} create character controller {0}, offset {1}, up ({2},{3},{4}), slope {5}/{6}, impulses {7}, autostep {8} (w:{9} h:{10}), snap {11} (d:{12}), dynStep {13}

SetCCSlope.display-text: {my} set CC {0} max climb {1}° min slide {2}°
SetCCSlope.description: Set character controller slope climb and slide angles.

SetCCAutostep.description: Enable or disable character controller autostep at runtime.

SetCCSnapToGround.description: Enable or disable character controller snap to ground at runtime.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Enable or disable snap to ground.

SetCCSlide.description: Enable or disable character controller sliding against obstacles.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Enable or disable sliding against obstacles.

SetCCMass.description: Set character controller mass for pushing dynamic bodies.

mass.name: Mass
mass.desc: Character mass for impulse resolution against dynamic bodies.

SetCCPushDynamicBodies.description: Enable or disable character controller pushing dynamic bodies.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Apply impulses to dynamic bodies on contact.

SetCCOffset.description: Set character controller skin width / gap offset.

offset.name: Offset
offset.desc: Small gap between character and surroundings (skin width).

SetCCUp.description: Set the character controller up direction for floor detection.

SetCCNormalNudgeFactor.description: Set character controller normal nudge factor for penetration recovery.

value.name: Value
value.desc: Normal nudge factor. Controls how aggressively the character is pushed out of penetrations.

RemoveCharacterController.description: Remove and free a character controller.

scale.name: Scale
scale.desc: Scale between render and physics world, typically 100

PausePhysics.description: Pause the physics simulation. Bodies keep their positions.

AddSphericalJoint.display-text: Add {my} spherical joint to uid {6} at {0}, {1}, {2} to {3}, {4}, {5}
AddSphericalJoint.description: Add spherical joint between self and target.

AddRevoluteJoint.display-text: Add {my} revolute joint to uid {6} at {0}, {1}, {2} to {3}, {4}, {5} with axis {7}, {8}, {9}
AddRevoluteJoint.description: Add revolute joint between self and target.

SetRevoluteMotor.display-text: {my}: Set revolute motor to uid {0} vel {1} force {2}
SetRevoluteMotor.description: Drive a revolute joint at a target angular velocity. Set max force to 0 to disable.

targetUID.name: Target UID
targetUID.desc: Target body UID of the revolute joint.

targetVelocity.name: Target velocity
targetVelocity.desc: Target angular velocity in rad/s. Positive = counter-clockwise.

maxForce.name: Max force
maxForce.desc: Motor force coefficient (N·m). Set to 0 to disable the motor.

SetRevoluteLimits.description: Set angular limits on a revolute joint.

targetUID.name: Target UID
targetUID.desc: Target body UID of the revolute joint.

enabled.name: Enable
enabled.desc: Enable or disable the angle limits.

SetSizeOverride.display-text: {my} enable {0} set size override to height {1}, width {2}, depth {3}
SetSizeOverride.description: Set size override for height, width, and depth.

CCIsGrounded.description: True if the character controller is touching the ground (from last move).

OnAnyCastShapeResult.description: Triggered on any cast shape result.

OnCastShapeResult.description: Triggered on cast shape result with the specified tag.

OnPhysicsReady.description: Triggered when physics is ready for this body.

OnPhysicsPaused.description: Triggered when physics simulation is paused.

IsPhysicsPaused.description: True when the physics simulation is paused.

RaycastCurrentTag.description: Tag of the raycast result currently being processed. Use inside On any raycast result.

RaycastResultAsJSON.description: Raycast result as JSON string for the given tag.

tag.name: Tag
tag.desc: Tag used when firing the raycast.

CastShapeCurrentTag.description: Tag of the cast shape result currently being processed. Use inside On any cast shape result.

CastShapeResultAsJSON.description: Cast shape result as JSON string for the given tag.

tag.name: Tag
tag.desc: Tag used when firing the shape cast.

CollisionTargetUID.description: UID of the other body involved in the collision.

CollisionStarted.description: 1 if collision started, 0 if collision ended.

CollisionNormalX.description: X component of the outward contact normal (points away from the other body).

CollisionNormalY.description: Y component of the outward contact normal (points away from the other body).

CollisionNormalZ.description: Z component of the outward contact normal (points away from the other body).

CollisionContactX.description: X position of the contact point in world units.

CollisionContactY.description: Y position of the contact point in world units.

CollisionContactZ.description: Z position of the contact point in world units.

CollisionImpulse.description: Normal impulse magnitude of the collision. Scales with mass and impact speed; useful for damage thresholds.

CharacterCollisionData.description: Character collision data as JSON string.

CCGrounded.description: 1 if the character controller is grounded, 0 otherwise.

CCComputedMovementX.description: X component of the corrected movement from last character controller move.

CCComputedMovementY.description: Y component of the corrected movement from last character controller move.

CCComputedMovementZ.description: Z component of the corrected movement from last character controller move.

CCCollisionNormalX.description: X component of the collision normal from last character controller collision.

CCCollisionNormalY.description: Y component of the collision normal from last character controller collision.

CCCollisionNormalZ.description: Z component of the collision normal from last character controller collision.

CCCollisionTargetUID.description: UID of the object hit in the last character controller collision.

CCCollisionTOI.description: Time of impact from the last character controller collision.

IsSleeping.description: 1 if the body is currently sleeping (physics paused), 0 if awake.
